data.<Text>k__BackingField: Hello! I’m new around here. You look like the one in charge.
That’s right, traveler. We don’t get many visitors these days.
This place seems peaceful.
But I saw some animal tracks on my way here. Is it safe around here?
Not entirely. Something’s been roaming near the old mill at night.
People are afraid to go out after dark.

<Options>k__BackingField.<Text>k__BackingField: I can take a look and deal with it if needed. Where should I go?
I see… Maybe it’s better if I stay away from that area.

data.<Text>k__BackingField: Brave of you. Follow the path north you’ll find the source of the trouble there. Just be ready for surprises.
Your choice. But remember avoiding danger doesn’t always make the road safer. Good luck, traveler.
Hey. What are you doing here?
Checking the tracks. Something’s been roaming nearby, and I’m trying to figure out what it is.

<Options>k__BackingField.<Text>k__BackingField: I can help if you need.
Got it. I’ll stay out of your way then.

data.<Text>k__BackingField: Good. Then we’ll scout the area together.
As you wish. But if you hear screams - come back fast.
Alright, lead the way.
Let’s hope I won’t.
The road’s quiet… almost too quiet.
Hey there, traveler! Careful — something attacked us not far from here!
Attacked? What happened?
Wild beasts. They came out of nowhere, tore through my caravan. I barely escaped.

<Options>k__BackingField.<Text>k__BackingField: Where did it happen? Maybe I can help.
That sounds bad. You should head back to the village - it’s safer there.

data.<Text>k__BackingField: I will, once I catch my breath. Just… watch yourself out here.
Just north of here, by the broken bridge. If you go there — be ready for anything.
Don’t worry. I’ll keep my eyes open.
Got it. I’ll check it out. Stay close to the road.
